exam.name: NEET
exam.contentBody: Overview of the NEET exam. Use this space for exam-level introduction.

units.name: Units and Measurement
units.contentBody:
This unit covers SI units, dimensions, and measurement.

Learning objectives

  • Understand base and derived units
  • Apply dimensional analysis

chapters.name: Physical Quantities
chapters.contentBody: Physical quantities are measurable properties. They can be scalar or vector.

topics.name: Scalars and Vectors
topics.contentBody: Scalars have magnitude only; vectors have magnitude and direction.

subtopics.name: Vector Addition
subtopics.contentBody: Vectors add by parallelogram or triangle law.

definitions.name: Resultant Vector
definitions.contentBody: The resultant vector is the single vector that has the same effect as two or more vectors combined.
